creator: rwm@tansoft.com
text:
We are trying to port an application from  Ultrix to FreeBSD that uses SYSV style
	shared memory.  When trying to allocate sufficent shared memory it causes a kernel
	panic in kmem_suballoc of a type 3.

Fix: 

Unknown, trying 2.2 snap to see if that fixes it.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Set the SHMALL to 48000
	Set the SHMMAX to 24000
	Rebuild the Kernel, install it and reboot (save a good kernel first)
